race.description: Sawtell Golf Club Country Boosted Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: FLYING SHELLY (1) scored over 1218m here first-up then struggled at Doomben last start in a much better race than this. Placed at three of five runs over today's trip. Finds a pretty plain BM58 and she looks a big chance to return to the winner's list. OLUFSEN (2) raced handy but couldn't quite finish his race off over 1050m at Inverell last time out. Backs up nine days later over a slightly shorter trip which will suit. Should give a good account. BRAZEN BRANDO (3) lines up for the 104th time. Racing very well on heavy tracks of late. Boasts a fine record over many seasons at this trip so he looks a solid each-way contender. LORD SEYMOUR (4) has performed well at both trips to Coffs Harbour this prep. One of the better hopes with the help of an inside draw.
